title: Indian-Style Fluffy Dal
description: A simple and comforting Indian-inspired dal made with fluffy rice and cooked to perfection. This dish is a staple in many Indian households.
instructions: Rinse the dal and soak it in water for at least 30 minutes.
Drain the water and pressure cook the dal with 4 cups of water until it's tender.
Heat the ghee in a pan and sauté the onions until they're lightly browned.
Add the ginger, cumin seeds, and turmeric powder to the pan and sauté for another minute.
Add the cooked dal to the pan and stir well.
Add the soaked and drained beans to the pan and stir well.
Season the dal with salt and stir well.
Cook the fluffy rice according to package instructions.
Serve the dal over the fluffy rice and garnish with fresh cilantro (optional).
Cook the dal for an additional 10-15 minutes to thicken the consistency.
Adjust the seasoning and serve hot.
